name: FilterDisplay
description: Filters and displays elements from a TimberModel by level or layer path.

inputParameters.name: layer_filter
inputParameters.description: Optional list of Layer elements, layer_paths as GH_Paths, or layer name strings to filter geometry output by layer.

inputParameters.name: group_filter
inputParameters.description: Optional list of group Elements to restrict output to those elements and their children.

inputParameters.name: display_level
inputParameters.description: What level of the hierarchy to display: 'panel', 'layer', 'timber'.

inputParameters.name: group_space
inputParameters.description: If True, geometry is transformed into each group's local space instead of world space.

inputParameters.name: CreateGeometry
inputParameters.description: If True, full geometry is created. Otherwise blank/shape.
